mapper.select: /* 엑셀 upload data 조회 */ -- 🔼 1. 전체 합계 행 (맨 위에 표시될 총계) SELECT '합계' AS SALES_DATE , NULL AS LOCATION_ID , NULL AS LOCATION_NM , NULL AS PRODUCT_NM , NULL AS BARCODE , NULL AS UNIT_PRICE , SUM(A.QTY)-SUM(A.REFUND_QTY) AS QTY , SUM(A.TOTAL_AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_AMOUNT , SUM(A.REAL_AMOUNT) AS REAL_AMOUNT , SUM(A.DISCOUNT_AMOUNT) AS DISCOUNT_AMOUNT , SUM(A.REFUND_AMOUNT) AS REFUND_AMOUNT , SUM(A.REFUND_QTY) AS REFUND_QTY , 1 SORT_SEQ FROM daily_sales_item A WHERE 1=1 AND A.SALES_DATE = #{day} UNION ALL -- 🔽 2. 실제 상세 목록 SELECT A.SALES_DATE , A.LOCATION_ID , B.LOCATION_NM , A.PRODUCT_NM , A.BARCODE , A.UNIT_PRICE , A.QTY , A.TOTAL_AMOUNT , A.REAL_AMOUNT , A.DISCOUNT_AMOUNT , A.REFUND_AMOUNT , A.REFUND_QTY , 2 SORT_SEQ FROM daily_sales_item A , store_location_mst B WHERE 1=1 AND A.LOCATION_ID = B.LOCATION_ID AND A.SALES_DATE = #{day} ORDER BY SORT_SEQ , BARCODE

/** 일자별 DB 판매 정보 조회 */ SELECT '합계' AS SALES_DATE , NULL AS LOCATION_ID , NULL AS LOCATION_NM , NULL AS SALES_TYPE , NULL AS PRODUCT_NM , NULL AS BARCODE , NULL AS UNIT_PRICE /* 입력당시 현장가 */ , SUM(D.QTY) AS QTY , NULL AS SALES_PRICE , SUM(D.SALES_PRICE) AS TOTAL_AMOUNT , SUM(D.SALES_PRICE - IFNULL(D.DISCOUNT_PRICE , 0)) AS REAL_AMOUNT , SUM(IFNULL(D.DISCOUNT_PRICE , 0)) AS DISCOUNT_AMOUNT , NULL AS REFUND_AMOUNT , NULL AS REFUND_QTY , 1 SORT_SEQ FROM sales_mst M INNER JOIN sales_dtl D ON M.SALES_ID = D.SALES_ID INNER JOIN product_mst P ON D.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN product_dtl L ON P.PRODUCT_ID = L.PRODUCT_ID AND D.PRODUCT_DTL_ID = L.PRODUCT_DTL_ID LEFT JOIN store_location_mst C ON L.LOCATION_ID = C.LOCATION_ID WHERE 1=1 AND DATE_FORMAT(M.SALES_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') = #{day} UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(M.SALES_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS SALES_DATE , C.LOCATION_ID AS LOCATION_ID , C.LOCATION_NM AS LOCATION_NM , M.SALES_TYPE AS SALES_TYPE , P.PRODUCT_NM AS PRODUCT_NM , P.P_VARCODE_NO AS BARCODE , MAX(D.UNIT_PRICE) AS UNIT_PRICE /* 입력당시 현장가 */ , SUM(D.QTY) AS QTY , MAX(D.UNIT_PRICE) AS SALES_PRICE , SUM(D.SALES_PRICE ) AS TOTAL_AMOUNT , SUM(D.SALES_PRICE - IFNULL(D.DISCOUNT_PRICE , 0)) AS REAL_AMOUNT , SUM(IFNULL(D.DISCOUNT_PRICE , 0)) AS DISCOUNT_AMOUNT , 0 AS REFUND_AMOUNT , 0 AS REFUND_QTY , 2 SORT_SEQ FROM sales_mst M INNER JOIN sales_dtl D ON M.SALES_ID = D.SALES_ID INNER JOIN product_mst P ON D.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN product_dtl L ON P.PRODUCT_ID = L.PRODUCT_ID AND D.PRODUCT_DTL_ID = L.PRODUCT_DTL_ID LEFT JOIN store_location_mst C ON L.LOCATION_ID = C.LOCATION_ID WHERE 1=1 AND DATE_FORMAT(M.SALES_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') = #{day} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(M.SALES_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') , M.SALES_TYPE , C.LOCATION_ID , C.LOCATION_NM , P.PRODUCT_NM , P.P_VARCODE_NO ORDER BY SORT_SEQ , BARCODE

/*상품 재고 조회*/ SELECT PRODUCT_ID , PRODUCT_NM , BARCODE , LOCATION_ID , ORG_STOCK_QTY , SALES_QTY , SPECIAL_QTY , AVAILABLE_QTY FROM v_product_stock WHERE PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} AND LOCATION_ID = #{locationId}

/** 지점별 바코드 기준 오늘자 판매량 */ SELECT IFNULL(SUM(SD.QTY),0) FROM sales_dtl SD JOIN sales_mst SM ON SD.SALES_ID = SM.SALES_ID JOIN product_dtl PD ON SD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID = PD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID JOIN product_mst PM ON PM.PRODUCT_ID = PD.PRODUCT_ID WHERE PM.P_VARCODE_NO = #{barcode} AND PD.LOCATION_ID = #{locationId}
AND SM.SALES_DATE >= #{salesDate} AND SM.SALES_DATE < DATE_ADD(#{salesDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)

SELECT SD.SALES_ID , SD.SALES_DTL_ID , SD.QTY FROM sales_dtl SD JOIN sales_mst SM ON SD.SALES_ID = SM.SALES_ID JOIN product_mst PM ON SD.PRODUCT_ID = PM.PRODUCT_ID JOIN product_dtl PD ON SD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID = PD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID WHERE PM.P_VARCODE_NO = #{barcode} AND PD.LOCATION_ID = #{locationId} AND DATE(SM.SALES_DATE) = #{salesDate}
